sidebar.dontHavePapersDesc: Our experts can help you gather and verify your property documents.
sidebar.faqQ1: How do I protect my property?
sidebar.faqA1: Start by digitizing all your property documents through Wisebox. Our platform helps you maintain a verified digital record that can be used as evidence of ownership.
sidebar.faqA2: Essential documents include your deed of ownership (dalil), mutation records, tax receipts, and any relevant court orders. Our checklist will guide you through what's needed.
sidebar.faqA3: Initial verification typically takes 3-5 business days. Complex cases involving multiple co-owners or disputed records may take longer.
sidebar.faqA4: Yes, you can add or modify co-owners at any time through the property edit page. All co-owners will be notified of changes.

consultation.title: Consultations
consultation.description: Get expert guidance on your property documentation
consultation.expertHelpDesc: Our property consultants can help you understand what documents you need, how to obtain missing papers, and ensure your property file is complete.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.recommendation0: No documents uploaded. We recommend starting with a consultancy service.
assessment.recommendationLow: Some documents are missing. Upload remaining documents or use our document retrieval service.
assessment.recommendationHigh: Almost there! Upload the remaining documents to complete your property file.
assessment.recommendation100: All documents uploaded! Consider a document assessment service for verification.
